post.summary: Create a new user account
Exchange credentials for a token pair
Rotate a refresh token for a fresh access + refresh pair
Revoke a refresh token (idempotent)
Change the authenticated user password
Request a password-reset email (always 200 to prevent enumeration)
Reset password using a token from a reset email

get.summary: List active API keys for the current user

post.summary: Create a new API key (plaintext returned once)

get.summary: List campaigns the user owns or is a member of

post.summary: Create a new campaign (the creator becomes owner)

get.summary: Get a campaign (member or owner only)

delete.summary: Delete a campaign (owner only). Cascades to memberships, library, log.

post.summary: Add a member by email lookup (owner only)

patch.summary: Owner-only: promote a member to manager or demote back to member. Owner transitions go through transfer-ownership.

delete.summary: Remove a member. Owners may remove anyone but the owner; managers may remove only members.

post.summary: Transfer ownership to an existing member (owner only)

400.description: New owner is not a member

post.summary: Create a campaign invitation (owner or manager)

409.description: Already a member or pending invitation exists

get.summary: List pending invitations for a campaign (owner or manager)

delete.summary: Cancel a pending invitation (owner or manager)

get.summary: List the current user’s pending invitations

post.summary: Accept an invitation; creates membership at the invited role
Reject an invitation
Mark a notification as read
Mark every unread notification as read
Suspend a user (superuser only). Cannot suspend self.
Unsuspend a user (superuser only). Refuses while purge is pending.
Schedule the user for hard-delete in 30 days. Suspends them in the same call. Idempotent — re-purge rebases the timer.
Clear the purge timer (does NOT auto-unsuspend).

get.summary: Get the campaign library (member or owner)

post.summary: Add a library trait (owner only)
Add a library skill (owner only)
Add a library item (owner only)

get.summary: Export the library as YAML (member or owner)

post.summary: Import a library YAML document (owner only)

200.description: Per-section counts of created / updated / deleted rows

get.summary: List log entries (members see campaign-visible + their own private)

post.summary: Create a log entry (author = current user)

patch.summary: Edit a log entry (author or campaign owner)

delete.summary: Delete a log entry (author or campaign owner)

get.summary: List the user’s characters and characters in their campaigns

post.summary: Create a character

200.description: Character detail. Returns the full sheet to the owner and to GM/campaign owners; returns the minimal "readily apparent" payload to fellow members when the parent campaign has shareCharacterSheets=false. Discriminated by the `view` field.

post.summary: Dismiss or restore a warning code
Add a trait to a character (owner only)

201.description: Trait created — response includes the refreshed character

post.summary: Add a skill to a character (owner only)

201.description: Skill created — response includes the refreshed character

post.summary: Add a spell to a character (owner only)

201.description: Spell created — response includes the refreshed character

post.summary: Add an inventory item (owner only)

201.description: Item created — response includes the refreshed character

delete.summary: Delete an inventory item (owner only). Children are reparented to the item parent.

patch.summary: Patch the combat state (owner only). Upserts on first call.

post.summary: Replay a batch of client outbox operations against the server
Pull rows + tombstones since the per-class cursor positions
